resources.string: If you\'re in immediate danger, please reach out now.
Not set — add one in Settings so CereBro can reach them in a crisis (with your consent).
CereBro is a companion, not a clinician. When you want a real person, these connect you with one.
Directories of professional help near you
A vetted coach directory for India is on our roadmap. Until it\'s real, the lines above reach real people today.
You\'re offline — the companion needs a connection. The Toolkit below still works.
AI companion — not a therapist or crisis service
You matter. Support is available right now.
Tap for crisis resources — real people, 24/7.

• It's AI, not a person — replies are generated.
• It isn't medical care and never diagnoses or prescribes.
• It isn't for emergencies — in one, contact local services.
• Conversations are reviewed for safety signals only.
Tap the orb to talk live
Speak or type — small worries welcome.
Or start from where you are
Save this conversation to my journal
Something went wrong — please try again.
Couldn\'t transcribe — you can type below.
Microphone access is off — you can still type below.
Speaking — tap the orb to interrupt
Listening… tap the orb when you\'re done
This one lives in the iOS app.
You\'re offline — showing your last copy.
How was last night? A 20-second check-in.
The day is winding down — a quieter mix, or tonight\'s wind-down guide?

plurals.name: today_presence_days
plurals.item: %1$d day this week — once a day is plenty.
%1$d days this week — once a day is plenty.

resources.string: One small check-in counts as showing up — gentle, no pressure.
Improve your sleep, night by night
A slower evening makes for a softer morning.
Guided multi-day journeys — start with Sleep Reset
Uses your Health Connect permission to read last night on this phone — nothing is saved until you tap Save night. The Sleep history switch in Privacy & memory controls what CereBro remembers.
No recent sleep found in Health Connect.
Logged — one honest night at a time.
Log a few more nights and honest averages appear here — no guesses.
You averaged %1$s. Your bedtime varied by about %2$s this week.
Blend rain, ocean, wind & a soft drone
If you\'re wide awake for 20+ minutes, get up, do something quiet and dim, come back sleepy.
Same wake time, even after a short night
Your body clock anchors on when you get up.
From CBT-I (cognitive behavioural therapy for insomnia) — the best-evidenced approach in sleep apps (Lancet Digital Health, 2025).
Your entries stay behind your screen lock.
Where did you feel most like yourself today?
Name the worry — then one truer thought beside it.
What\'s one thing you could set down tonight?
What went better than you expected?
If today had a weather, what was it — and why?
Your draft is safe — it survived the restart.
Your saved reflections will appear here — private to you.
Require your screen lock to open
Journal entries are yours. Safety scanning quietly surfaces support when something sounds heavy — it never blocks or shares your writing.
In India, Tele-MANAS is available any time — call 14416, free, day or night.
A gentle starting point — or write about anything.
You don\'t have to carry this alone
That entry sounded heavy. If things feel urgent, real people can help right now — in India, call Tele-MANAS at 14416, or dial your local emergency number.
Night, dawn, or match your system
What the AI has learned · delete anytime
Your quiet space for daily mental fitness,\nbetter sleep, and calmer focus.
Private by design — nothing is ever shared.
Who CereBro is for — and what it isn\'t
Here\'s exactly what your AI companion can and can\'t do for you.
If you are in immediate danger, call emergency services now.
Listen, reflect, guide tools, suggest a plan.
Diagnose, prescribe, replace therapy, or handle emergencies.
Talk and reflect in the language you think in. Mix more than one if that\'s you.
What feels most true right now?
No questionnaire — just pick the one that fits today. CereBro shapes your first reset and plan around it.
Two minutes of guided breathing — follow the orb for a few cycles, or skip ahead if now isn\'t the moment.
Private by default — CereBro remembers nothing you don\'t switch on. Change any of this later in Settings.
Lets the companion recall your entries
Never on without you switching it on
You\'ve had your first win — want a quiet nudge to come back tomorrow? Never noisy, always easy to turn off.
Create your quiet space for daily mental fitness, journal and check-ins.
Sign in to keep your plan, journal and check-ins in sync across devices.
Google sign-in isn\'t set up yet — use email below.
Reset link sent — check your email.
Code sent to %1$s — check your email.
Pick what the moment needs — ground, breathe, reframe, settle.
5-4-3-2-1 grounding — come back to the present through your senses.
Tap the water, let it widen
Pop gently — no timer, no losing. Just breathe and tap.
In, hold, out, hold — four counts each
A gentle in and out, nothing to hold
CBT reframe — from stuck to balanced
DBT reset for very intense moments
Textures, temperature, your feet on the floor.
Pop them slowly — no rush, no score to chase.
Soundscapes and sleep stories to slow a racing mind.
Titles with narration play their own audio; the rest play a calming ambient bed.
Blend rain, ocean, wind and a soft drone into your own calm — nudge each one to taste.
Fades out in %1$s — drift off, it stops itself.
Pick a soundscape or story from Sounds and it plays here.
Continuous ambient bed · this title has no narration yet.
Narrated track · streams from your library.
Fades out ~10 seconds before the timer ends — sleep through it.
Couldn\'t load your week — try again shortly.
Two quick scales — see real change later
Log a few days and honest patterns appear here — no guesses.
First-party — computed on your own data, never sold or shared.
Multi-day paths to a calmer baseline. Start any time; go at your pace.
Programs are evidence-informed — built on CBT and sleep-science techniques.
Couldn\'t load journeys — try again shortly.
Complete — beautifully done. Start another whenever you like.
Showing up is the whole assignment today.
Same care, different voice. Change it any time — conversations adapt from the next message.
Dawn is a light, warm look that\'s easier to read in daylight. Sleep always stays night — it\'s a wind-down space.
The deep-indigo look, day and night
A warm, light look for daytime
Sets which emergency lines the crisis screen shows.
Couldn\'t save that change — check your connection and try again.
Counts only — never your content or account
Require phone PIN, password, pattern, or biometrics
Unlock the full library, longer programs, and unlimited voice — same private-by-design promise.
Billing isn\'t wired on Android yet — Play Billing lands with Play Console setup. On iOS this is live via StoreKit.
Once a day around 9am — gentle, no pressure.
Delivered on-device via a scheduled alarm — no server or FCM required.
Your journal, chat and sleep contents stay yours. Support tooling sees counts and account state — never the words.
Toggle what\'s remembered in Privacy & memory, export a full copy any time, or delete everything permanently.
We don\'t sell your data or use third-party ad SDKs. Analytics are first-party aggregates.
Tools are labeled with why they work. Where something is comfort rather than therapy, we say so.
A companion alongside care, never a replacement. It doesn\'t diagnose or treat.
Built with published clinical research; a formal clinical advisory process is on our roadmap.
Download everything CereBro has stored for you — mood, journal, sleep and chat.
Permanently erase your account and everything in it. There\'s no recovery.
Couldn\'t delete your account. Please try again.
Follow the orb — in for four, hold, out for four.
Took a minute to breathe and settle.
Add this practice to your private journal
Catch the thought, look at it honestly, and write the fairer version. This is the whole skill.

The thought: %1$s

What supports it: %2$s

What doesn't: %3$s

A more balanced thought: %4$s
Evidence it\'s not the whole story
Reframing is a core cognitive-behavioural (CBT) technique — the approach with the strongest evidence among app-delivered tools (Linardon et al. 2024, World Psychiatry).
A DBT skill for when emotion is at a 9 or 10 and thinking feels impossible. Work the four steps in order.
Hold something cold, splash cool water on your face, or step into cooler air.
Cold triggers the dive reflex and slows your heart rate fast.
60–90 seconds of anything vigorous: star jumps, fast stairs, a brisk walk.
Burns off the adrenaline that keeps the alarm ringing.
Exhale longer than you inhale: in for 4, out for 6–8, for a minute.
Long exhales switch on the calming branch of your nervous system.
Tense a muscle group as you inhale, release completely as you exhale.
Teaches the body the difference between holding and letting go.
If the urge to hurt yourself is present, please also reach out — Urgent support lives in the You tab.
TIPP comes from dialectical behaviour therapy (DBT) — skills clinicians teach for riding out intense moments.
Settle in — the rhythm finds you
In for four, hold for four, out for four, hold for four — let the orb set the pace.
Let your breath follow the orb as the glow shifts with each phase.
A gentle four in, four out — nothing to hold. Stay as long as you like.
Paced breathing is used in clinical distress-tolerance and relaxation protocols. Slowing the breath activates the body\'s calming response.
Watch the glow, then repeat it.
Reached round %1$d. Fresh start, no rush.
Tap anywhere on the water. Watch each ripple widen and let go.
Name one small thing you\'re thankful for — a flower is planted for each.
Your garden is waiting for its first flower.
Noting what you\'re grateful for is a studied positive-psychology practice linked to improved mood over time.
Agentic plan · adapts to your check-ins
We couldn\'t load your plan just now.
%1$d of %2$d steps done · updates from your check-ins and sleep diary
No steps yet — update your plan to generate some.
Update plan from my latest check-ins
Everything CereBro has learned about you — visible, honest, and yours to delete.
Couldn\'t load your patterns — try again.
Nothing yet. Patterns only appear once a few weeks of real check-ins support them — no guesses, ever.
Removes chat history, computed insights and the companion\'s thread memory — it starts fresh. Your journal, check-ins and sleep diary stay: they\'re your content, with their own controls.
Memory cleared — %1$d messages and %2$d insights forgotten.
Type a couple of letters — everything served to the apps is searchable.
Couldn\'t load the library — check your connection and try again.
Nothing matches \"%1$s\" — try a different word.
One tap tells CereBro how you\'re arriving — plans, insights and starters all personalize from it.
Three small steps a day, rebuilt from your check-ins and sleep diary. Tap the hero any time.
A voice companion that listens first. It\'s AI — never a therapist, and always honest about that.
Nothing is remembered without your say-so. Change anything under You → Privacy & memory.
Where things stand these days. Saving this lets future insights show real change instead of guesses.
How stressed have you felt lately?
Stays on this device — used only to show your progress in Insights.
